creator: scott@sabami.seaslug.org
text:
The author of the nmh package just released a new version. This is a patch
	to bring the mail/nmh port up to date.

Fix: 

Apply the patch at

	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/nmh-port-0.17-0.18.patch

	to the mail/nmh port.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Use the old version.
